indicators.name: High ceiling height
indicators.rationale: The high ceiling height provides ample space for comfortable sitting and working.

indicators.name: Natural light from windows
indicators.rationale: The presence of natural light can reduce eye strain and improve mood.

indicators.name: Wooden surfaces
indicators.rationale: Wooden surfaces are visually appealing but may require maintenance to prevent dust accumulation.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene has high ceiling height and natural light, which are positive factors for computer work. However, the wooden surfaces might require maintenance.
